Personal learning project - AI Operations portfolio

AI-Assisted Lead Management Workflow

A practical prototype for turning messy commercial inquiries into a structured, AI-assisted operations workflow: lead capture, data organization, priority classification, suggested response, follow-up tracking, and proposal support.

Built with Make Google Sheets CRM AI-assisted analysis Commercial operations Workflow documentation

Workflow map

This diagram summarizes the prototype logic used for an AI-assisted commercial operations process.


Case summary

Problem

Leads often arrive through different channels with incomplete context. Without a clear system, teams lose time organizing data, deciding priority, writing responses, and remembering follow-ups.

Solution

A simple AI-assisted workflow that captures lead information, stores it in a CRM-style spreadsheet, analyzes the inquiry, suggests next actions, supports follow-up, and connects the data to proposal preparation.

Expected impact

Faster response time, less repetitive work, clearer commercial traceability, better lead prioritization, and reusable workflow logic for small service businesses.

Workflow logic

1. Lead CaptureInquiry enters through a form, landing page, email, or manual intake.
2. Data RegistrationContact details, company, pain point, source, and service need are logged in a CRM-style sheet.
3. AI AnalysisAI summarizes context, identifies the main need, and prepares structured lead notes.
4. Priority + Next ActionThe lead is classified as high, medium, or low priority and a recommended action is generated.
5. Suggested ResponseAI drafts an email or message suggestion for human review before sending.
6. Follow-Up ManagementStatus, next action, review date, and notes are tracked to avoid losing opportunities.
7. Proposal SupportLead data can feed a proposal template with problem, diagnosis, solution, and scope.
8. Operational OutcomeThe process becomes easier to monitor, repeat, document, and improve over time.

Tools used

The prototype was built and documented using accessible no-code/low-code and AI tools.

Make Google Forms Google Sheets Gmail Google Docs ChatGPT Claude Zapier / n8n replication in progress

Important note: This is a personal learning and portfolio project, not a production client system. It was created to demonstrate practical AI operations thinking: process mapping, tool selection, workflow logic, documentation, and reusable automation structure.

Interview walkthrough script

A short explanation that can be used in interviews or as a Loom video script.

"I created this personal learning project to simulate how a service business can manage incoming leads with AI support. The workflow captures lead data, organizes it in a Google Sheets CRM, uses AI logic to summarize the request and suggest a priority, prepares a response draft, and tracks follow-up actions. The goal was to reduce manual work, improve response speed, and create a reusable system that a non-technical team could understand and operate."
